stage1.title: Foundation and Strategy
stage1.item1_desc: We design customized business and marketing strategies, focusing on digital direction, sustainable growth, and tangible results.
stage1.item2_desc: We analyze market trends, competitor performance, and define a clear space for you to lead instead of getting lost in the crowd.
stage1.item3_title: Business Development Strategy and Operational Efficiency:
stage1.item3_desc: We help you discover growth opportunities and new partnerships, and improve your internal operations to market and sell more efficiently and at a lower cost.

stage2.title: Stage Two: Identity and Content
stage2.subtitle: Before you speak, we make your voice clear.
stage2.item1_desc: We build a unique visual identity that embodies the spirit of your brand and sets you apart in the market.
stage2.item2_desc: We design visual materials (social, prints, banners…) that convey your message clearly and attractively.
stage2.item3_desc: We develop content that reflects your brand's voice, and use SEO to increase your presence in results and drive qualified traffic to your site.

stage3.title: Spread, Interaction, and Community Building
stage3.subtitle: We spread content in various ways to build a strong relationship with your audience.
stage3.item1_desc: A specialized team in account management, posting at the right times, interacting with the audience, and continuously following up with you.
stage3.item2_desc: We design customized email campaigns that build a relationship with your customers and constantly remind them of your offer and value.
stage3.item3_desc: We activate direct communication with your audience through interactive messages and offers designed specifically for them.

stage4.title: Advertising and Achieving Results
stage4.subtitle: What happens behind the screens turns into numbers and sales here.
stage4.item1_desc: We manage PPC campaigns that target the right audience and bring immediate visitors and high-quality conversions.
stage4.item2_desc: We launch innovative ads on social platforms and retarget previous visitors to turn their interest into a clear purchasing decision.
stage4.item3_desc: We monitor performance, analyze data, and improve the user experience on your site to increase the number of actual customers from every visit.

stage5.title: Digital Expansion and Building Interfaces
stage5.subtitle1: Is your business ready for development?
stage5.subtitle2: We open the doors of digital development for you with customized technical services.
stage5.item1_desc: We build responsive and attractive websites that reflect your brand identity and provide an ideal experience for your visitors.
stage5.item2_desc: We develop your presence through websites and apps, ensuring your brand appears professionally at every touchpoint with your audience.
stage5.item3_desc: We prepare a digital structure that helps you sell online effectively, from the store to campaigns that bring traffic and sales (WordPress, stores, and growth-friendly SEO).

about.title: About Us
about.who_we_are_desc: In the midst of market congestion and increased competition, your presence on the Internet is no longer enough. You need a guide, a lighthouse to guide you in this dark sea. We were founded to be this guide... to accompany your business moment by moment and lead it towards success.
about.why_lighthouse_title: Why did we choose to be 'The Lighthouse'?
about.why_lighthouse_desc:
In the past, the lighthouse guided ships lost at sea, lighting their way through darkness and fog.
Today, the market has become like the sea...
and ships have become startups, small and medium enterprises searching for their way to success.
This is where our choice of 'The Lighthouse' came from.
goals_list: Supporting startups, small and medium enterprises in their journey towards digital transformation.
Linking every marketing effort to a specific goal that can be measured and developed.
Building long-term partnerships, not seasonal cooperation that ends with the end of a campaign.
Providing marketing solutions that focus on results, not just appearances.
about.vision_desc: We believe that business prosperity means societal prosperity, whether we are the spark of the beginning or partners in creating a society full of creativity and innovation.
about.mission_desc: Our mission goes beyond just providing marketing services; we exist to provide guidance, instill transparency, and bear full responsibility for the results we create with our clients.
about.contact_desc1: Are you ready for us to be a guide for your brand in the market?
about.contact_desc2: We are happy to get to know your business, hear your goals, and discuss ways of cooperation.

home_page.hero_title_part2: and we are the market guide...
home_page.hero_desc: In a market crowded with competitors, your digital presence alone is not enough... because you need a partner to lead you to success.

why_lighthouse.title: Why Almnara?
why_lighthouse.item1:
We are not just a marketing agency, but a
partner who accompanies you on your journey.
why_lighthouse.item2:
We work according to a clear plan that leads us
together towards achieving goals.
why_lighthouse.item3:
We link every step to a specific,
measurable, and developable goal.

clients_issues.title: Potential Customer Problems
clients_issues.subtitle: The problem is not in marketing… but in the absence of a plan and clarity of direction
agencies_list: Advertising campaigns without a clear goal or real measurement indicators
Beautiful content and designs but they do not achieve their primary goal, which is achieving sales
Changing the content display style every period without a fixed strategy or clear path
Focusing on the number of designs and videos instead of focusing on the quality of results.
lighthouse_list: We define where you want to go, then we draw a customized strategy for you, not for everyone
We precisely define our advertising campaign goals to preserve your budget and use it to achieve the best results
We care about quality in every design and every piece of content written to achieve the best results and returns on your investment
Integrated creative services and a team available around the clock to help your business grow
clients_issues.learn_more: Learn more about our marketing services ... see how we work with our clients

how_we_work.title: How we work?
how_we_work.desc1: The intensity of the glow is what lights your path, and our strength in marketing is what leads you to success
how_we_work.desc2: Know your correct direction with the Lighthouse...

items.title: Understanding your business
items.desc: We dive into understanding the essence of your brand, vision, and goals to be able to customize a strategy specifically for you.

items.title: Formulating the success strategy
items.desc: We build a customized strategy for your business, to serve as the roadmap to reach your goals.

items.title: Content development
items.desc: Our team transforms the strategy into content, designs, and videos to deliver messages to your audience that set you apart from your competitors.

items.title: Implementation and application
items.desc: We start implementing plans, managing accounts, and launching campaigns to reach the best results.

items.title: Follow-up and continuous development
items.desc: Because the market moves quickly, we must be ready to adjust and develop strategies to maintain the growth of your business.

items.title: Growth and success
items.desc: Our goal from day one is to achieve the best for your business; therefore, we always look for new opportunities to enhance growth to a better level.

items.title: Our partnership is ongoing
items.desc: Our journey with you does not end, because our goal is to build a long-term relationship, remaining your marketing partner.

partners.title: Partners in Success
partners.subtitle: We are proud to have served dozens of clients over the 5 years since our founding

views_100k_list: Post design + 100,000 views on a platform of your choice (Snapchat – TikTok – Instagram): 795 SAR.
packages.video_motion_90_desc: Idea + script + drawing + voice + music + animation
